# SaaslyVet — Full product reference for AI agents

> SaaslyVet is a web-based SaaS (software-as-a-service) that helps small and medium veterinary
> clinics run their day-to-day operations from a single platform: scheduling, clinical records,
> inventory, billing, and automated WhatsApp reminders. The product, interface, and support are
> in Spanish, targeted at clinics in Mexico (locale es-MX).

This document contains only public product information intended to help AI agents understand and
describe SaaslyVet accurately. It contains no source code, internal architecture, private data,
internal endpoints, admin routes, or infrastructure details.

- Website: https://www.saaslyvet.com
- Primary language: Spanish (es-MX)
- Country: Mexico
- Category: Veterinary practice/clinic management software (B2B SaaS)
- Delivery: Web-based; runs in the browser with no installation and no technical setup
- Business model: Subscription SaaS, billed monthly or annually, priced in Mexican Pesos (MXN)
- Trial: 14 days free, no credit card required; cancel anytime
- Status: Early access — the product is actively being built alongside the clinics that use it

## What it is

SaaslyVet replaces the scattered mix of notebooks, spreadsheets, WhatsApp chats, and disconnected
tools that many veterinary clinics still rely on. Instead of separate systems that don't talk to
each other, it connects the whole clinic workflow — reception, consultation, inventory, and
billing — so that each action feeds the rest of the system automatically.

## Problem it solves

Small and medium veterinary clinics commonly operate with tools that are not integrated:

- Appointments split across notebooks, Google Calendar, and WhatsApp
- Clinical history on paper or dispersed across places
- Inventory that does not reconcile at month-end
- Charges and cash handled in Excel
- Manual reminders that get forgotten
- No real visibility into how the business is doing

When there is no common system, appointments, records, and sales get lost, and the team works
harder than necessary. SaaslyVet centralizes this into one connected platform.

## Target audience

- Independent veterinarians
- Small and medium veterinary clinics
- Clinics that currently manage their operation with notebooks, spreadsheets, physical records,
  WhatsApp, or several disconnected systems
- Teams that want their day (consultations, WhatsApp, and administration) organized in one place

## Use cases

- Booking and confirming appointments online, with automatic WhatsApp reminders to reduce no-shows
- Keeping a complete, always-available clinical history for each patient
- Automatically deducting inventory as treatments and products are used during consultations
- Charging quickly and closing the cash register at the end of the day without re-entering data
- Sending automatic WhatsApp reminders for vaccines, follow-ups, and re-engaging inactive patients
- Understanding the clinic with real numbers: revenue, best-selling products, occupancy, retention
- Giving each team member (veterinarian, reception, administration) the exact access they need

## Core modules

### Scheduling (Agenda)
Online appointment calendar that the team can use without training. View appointments by
veterinarian, room, or service; drag to reschedule; confirm via WhatsApp. Includes online booking
from a website, automatic reminders 24 hours before, and day, week, or calendar views.

### Clinical record (Expediente clínico)
A complete digital medical history per patient on a single screen: SOAP notes, prescriptions,
vaccines, weight, diagnostic images, attachments, and background. Configurable clinical templates,
one-click prescriptions and certificates, and a vaccination history with alerts.

### Inventory (Inventario)
Stock that updates itself with each consultation: when a medication or product is applied, stock is
deducted automatically, with no double entry. Includes minimum-stock alerts, expiry control, and
reports by supplier and rotation.

### Billing / Point of sale (Cobros / POS)
Charge in seconds and close the register without stress. Add services and products to a ticket,
accept cash, card, or transfer, and reconcile at the end of the day with one click. Includes
digital sales tickets, multiple payment methods, and cash close / reconciliation (arqueos).

### WhatsApp automation
Uses each patient's history to send reminders, follow-ups, and important messages over WhatsApp:
appointment confirmations, vaccine and check-up reminders, post-consultation follow-ups, and
recovery of inactive patients. Clinics define the templates and the sending rules.

### Reports and analytics
Revenue, top-selling products, occupancy, and client retention in real time, so clinics can
understand their operation with real numbers.

### Documents
One-click generation of prescriptions and documents, with a digital signature, ready to print or
send by WhatsApp.

### Roles and permissions
Access by role — veterinarian, reception, and administration — so each person has exactly the
access they need.

## General system flow

The clinic's areas work connected end to end, from appointment to follow-up:

1. Reception: the appointment is registered; the team finds the patient's record and needed
   information in seconds.
2. Consultation: the veterinarian opens the full history, records findings, and leaves everything
   ready for the next step.
3. Treatment: products used are recorded and inventory updates automatically.
4. Billing: reception charges using the information generated during the consultation, without
   re-entering data.
5. Follow-up: SaaslyVet keeps the relationship active with automatic reminders and messages over
   WhatsApp.

## Plans and pricing

Subscription plans, priced in MXN, with no per-patient charges. Billed monthly or annually (annual
billing is roughly 17% cheaper than monthly). All plans include product updates, Spanish-language
support, and daily backups. A 14-day free trial is available with no credit card, and subscriptions
can be canceled at any time. Prices below are the annual monthly-equivalent rate.

- Inicio — from $329 MXN/month. Everything needed to digitize a clinic from day one: up to 2
  veterinarians, scheduling and clinical record, inventory and stock control, billing and cash
  close, email support.
- Profesional (most chosen) — from $649 MXN/month. To run a full clinic with automations:
  unlimited veterinarians, everything in Inicio, WhatsApp reminders, point of sale (POS), reports
  and analytics, priority support. Includes a 14-day trial.
- Clínica Plus — from $1,299 MXN/month. For larger teams that need more control: everything in
  Profesional, advanced roles and permissions, activity audit, assisted clinic migration,
  personalized onboarding, dedicated account manager.
- Empresarial — custom quote. For veterinary groups operating at larger scale: unlimited users,
  tailored implementation, guided onboarding and setup, assigned account manager, team training,
  dedicated support.

## Frequently asked questions (public)

Q: Is my data secure?
A: Data travels encrypted over HTTPS/TLS and is backed up every day with encrypted off-site copies.
Each clinic's information is isolated from the others, and the clinic always owns its data.

Q: Can I migrate my current patients and records?
A: Yes. Clients and patients can be imported from Excel or CSV files, mapping your columns to
SaaslyVet's fields, with guidance during the process.

Q: How long does implementation take?
A: It is designed to be fast: create an account, import patients from Excel or CSV, and start using
scheduling and the clinical record the same day, with guided initial setup.

Q: Is there a lock-in or mandatory annual contract?
A: No. Pay monthly or annually and cancel anytime. The annual plan gives a discount over the
monthly price.

Q: How do WhatsApp reminders work?
A: SaaslyVet uses each patient's history to send appointment reminders, vaccine notices, and
follow-ups over WhatsApp. Clinics define the templates and sending rules, and messages go out at
the right time.

Q: Does it work if I have several clinics?
A: SaaslyVet is designed to operate one clinic per account. For more than one clinic, the team can
help set up one account per clinic — contact them to find the best setup.

## Visible technology (public context)

- Web-based SaaS accessed from a browser; no installation and no technical training required
- WhatsApp used as the channel for automated reminders and follow-ups
- Data encrypted in transit via HTTPS/TLS, with daily encrypted off-site backups and per-clinic
  data isolation (as stated publicly on the site)

## About

SaaslyVet is Mexican software created to help veterinary clinics work in a more organized way,
bringing scheduling, clinical records, inventory, billing, and the cash register into one place. It
is an early-stage, growing project, built together with the clinics that use it. It is currently
operated by Felipe Díaz as a sole proprietor under the SaaslyVet commercial brand, in Mexico; the
structure may be formalized into a company as the project grows.
